name: Adventuring
description:
Adventuring is all about exploring the world, uncovering places long forsaken, and discovering artifacts of past civilizations. It's a path for fearless explorers undertaking bold voyages into the unknown.

You can train this skill by crafting, discovering points of interest or resources.

name: Agriculture
description:
Agriculture is the art of growing crops, rising livestock and using those resources to make tasty food, sometimes with surprising qualities. It's the easiest way to make sure that you will always be full.

You can train this skill by planting crops, crafting tasty dishes, harvesting, threshing, milking cows or goats and shearing sheep.

name: Alchemy
description:
Alchemist are people who mix together seemingly random ingredients and get surprising results. By combining precise measurements of natural components with arcane processes, the alchemist can transmute raw materials into substances with unique properties. Often explosive.

You can train this skill by carving resources from corpses, or crafting and salvaging products of Alchemy.

name: Armorsmithing
description:
Armorsmithing is the ability to bend metal into invulnerable and stunning pieces of protection. While standing near a blazing hot forge, you'll be making armor pieces, and shields like the world has never seen before. A stronger main hand comes as a hefty bonus.

You can train this skill by crafting, upgrading or salvaging armor pieces.

name: Athletics
description:
Athletics is a path towards limit-breaking physical prowess. It requires tremendous discipline and a burning desire to be better than everyone else. Experts in the field run faster, jump higher, throw further and withstand more pain.

You can train this skill by using abilities, dragging (at least weight 40 objects, up to level 5), throwing, climbing, jumping down from height, and walking.

name: Axe Fighting
description:
Mastery of the axe is for the thoughest and the most brutal of warriors, as proper wielding requires an extraordinary strength. In the right hands, these weapons can do the most devastating damage of all types of melee weapons.

You can train this skill by using abilities and attacking with axes.

name: Divine Fists
description:
Your fists become a beacon of celestial might, pummeling foes with escalating, sanctified force that shines brighter the longer you fight. Unleash a torrent of divine wrath with glove or knuckle weapons, infusing each strike with radiant holy damage.

You can train this skill by using abilities and attacking unarmed.

name: Carpentry
description:
Carpentry is the craft of making big pieces of wood smaller and nailing them together to create a lasting value in the form of a furniture, bow, shield, or wood-based building.

You can train this skill by crafting, upgrading or salvaging wooden equipment and building wooden structures.

name: Construction
description:
Construction enables the creation of stone and metal-based structures in the world. It is a path for those who wish to leave a legacy that will remain for many generations.

You can train this skill by claiming a region and building structures.

name: Cryomancy
description:
Cryomancy is a magical power that manipulates water and its temperature. While adepts of this magic are known for encompassing their opponents in frozen tombs, many use it to control water flow or even cause rain.

You can train this skill by using abilities.

name: Floromancy
description:
Floromancy is a mystical practice deeply rooted in the essence of nature. Practitioners of floromancy, known as floromancers, harness the inherent power of plants and vegetation to wield magic that is both beautiful and deadly.

You can train this skill by using abilities.

name: Hunting
description:
Hunting allows you to track your prey with precision, unleash deadly volleys with bow or crossbow, and forge bonds with animal companions.

You can train this skill by using abilities and attacking with bows and crossbows.

name: Imbuing
description:
This mystical skill intertwines the artistry of jewelry making with the arcane craft of brewing magical ingredients. Masters of this skill possess a deep understanding of both the physical and metaphysical properties of materials, allowing them to infuse their creations with enchantments that range from enhancing beauty to bestowing protective charms.

You can train this skill by crafting, upgrading or salvaging some jewelery and magic ingredients.

name: Leadership
description:
Leadership is your weapon, empowering those around you. Your strategic guidance unlocks their potential, and together you forge a formidable force able to overcome any danger.

You can train this skill by giving orders to your companions, when your companions defeat enemies, or when they finish building structures.

name: Leatherworking
description:
Leatherworking utilizes furs and leathers of dead things to create extra layers of protection against weather conditions or physical harm as clothing or armor. Even though metal offers better defense, leather is cheaper and doesn't reduce reflexes making it ideal for agile characters.

You can train this skill by crafting, upgrading or salvaging armor pieces.

name: Mace Fighting
description:
It may not be possible to decapitate an opponent with a mace or a hammer, but popping someone's head like a watermelon is probably the next best thing. The specialty of mace fighting is control of the battlefield, as the users focus on disrupting the enemy's actions.

You can train this skill by using abilities and attacking with maces.

name: Necromancy
description:
Necromancy is the magical art of communing with the dead. It's dangerous and corrupts its practitioners' mind and soul. Most mortals fear death, but not as much as they fear the beings willing to go to any lengths to defy it. This path is not often chosen by those seeking devastating destructive powers, as most individuals desire it not to cause harm to others but to prolong their life or recover a lost loved one. That is until their grief and lust for knowledge consume them entirely.

You can train this skill by using abilities, corrupting souls, and taking control of undead creatures.

name: Pole Fighting
description:
Riders are not a problem if they charge directly at a prepared pike. Your opponents can't make a sword slash attack against you if you keep them at the tip of your long spear. Polearms can be a great addition to any warrior's arsenal, as they focus on benefits of range and positioning.

You can train this skill by using abilities and attacking with polearms.

name: Protection
description:
Protection is a skill focused entirely on one single goal - not dying. Whether you want to nimbly dodge attacks or use a bulky shield to cover yourself, this is the path to becoming an old veteran one day.

You can train this skill by using abilities and parrying with a shield equipped.

name: Pyromancy
description:
Pyromancy is one of the schools of magic that focuses on the devastating power of fire and extremely high temperatures. It's a path for people who want to see the world burn and their enemies turn to ash.

You can train this skill by using abilities.

name: Stormthrowing
description:
Stormthrowing fuses expert weapon throwing with electrifying magic. Perfect for combatants seeking a blend of ranged physical attacks and elemental magic. This deadly combination makes them formidable foes on the battlefield.

You can train this skill by attacking with throwing weapons and by using abilities.

name: Sword Fighting
description:
Swords are the most common and versatile weapons. They are light, fast, and well-balanced. Mastery of the blade comes with advantages in hit chance, counterattacks, and causing devastating bleed attacks.

You can train this skill by using abilities and attacking with swords.

name: Tailoring
description:
Tailoring is the craft of making clothes from natural fibers. Whether stylish, fearsome, or funny, you too can become a decoration for a new hat. Most clothes offer limited to no physical protection but are light and don't restrict movement.

You can train this skill by crafting, upgrading or salvaging clothes.

name: Thievery
description:
Thievery is the art of taking what doesn't yet belong to you. Depending on the practitioner's wit, it can be a path toward incredible wealth or a noose around the neck. This skill is also associated with the mastery of daggers.

You can train this skill by using abilities and attacking with daggers, as well as pickpocketing people or robbing families.

name: Weaponsmithing
description:
The only thing better than standing all day near a blazing hot forge assembling armors is to stand in the same spot crafting weapons. Whether you need a sharp sword, a pointy dagger, a mighty axe, or a massive hammer to compensate for something, a weaponsmith will get you the good stuff.

You can train this skill by crafting, upgrading or salvaging weapons.
